privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 3 synthetic policies injected by setup_task.sh into the agent's desktop environment. The memo explicitly requires the agent to upload HIPAA_Compliance_v4.pdf ('2026 HIPAA and Privacy Standards'), Remote_Work_Guidelines_2026.pdf ('Hybrid and Remote Work Policy'), and Code_of_Conduct_2026.pdf ('Employee Code of Conduct (2026 Edition)'), exactly matching the metadata parameters evaluated by the verifier.
